highlights.title: Annual QA Conference 2026
highlights.description: Our flagship conference returns with hands-on sessions, community showcases, and hiring conversations for QA professionals across Kenya.

highlights.title: Member Directory Refresh
highlights.description: Find automation engineers, QA analysts, and test architects by skill, city, and working style in the community directory.

highlights.title: Latest Event Moments
highlights.description: Browse photos from workshops, conferences, and social meetups as the gallery grows with each new community event.

events.title: Annual QA Conference 2026
events.excerpt: Kenya's flagship QA conference featuring talks, workshops, and community hiring sessions.
events.description: A full-day conference for QA engineers, test managers, SDETs, and aspiring testers. Expect practitioner-led talks, automation demos, and community networking.

events.title: Automation Testing Workshop
events.excerpt: Hands-on workshop on practical UI and API test automation workflows.
events.description: A practical workshop covering test design, automation layering, and maintainable execution pipelines.

events.title: QA Networking Mixer
events.excerpt: A relaxed evening for practitioners, leads, and hiring teams to connect.
events.description: Meet fellow QA professionals, exchange ideas, and grow your network in an informal setting.

events.title: Performance Testing Deep Dive
events.excerpt: Learn to design, run, and interpret performance tests for modern applications.
events.description: A workshop focused on realistic performance test design, tool selection, and bottleneck analysis.

events.title: Security Testing Bootcamp
events.excerpt: An intensive session on security testing techniques, risk thinking, and OWASP fundamentals.
events.description: This bootcamp equips QA professionals with practical approaches for identifying and communicating product security risk.

events.title: QA Career Growth Panel
events.excerpt: Senior practitioners discuss progression from analyst to QA lead and beyond.
events.description: A panel on skill building, leadership, mentorship, and moving across testing specializations.
